articles.title: Meta signs first AI data center deal in India with Reliance
articles.description: The 168-megawatt facility will support Meta's global AI computing needs and can be expanded over time.
articles.author: Jagmeet Singh

articles.title: Top Lucid Motors executive departs amid new CEO’s leadership shakeup
articles.description: The exec, Emad Dlala, has left just a few months after being promoted to SVP of engineering and digital, TechCrunch has learned.
articles.author: Sean O'Kane

articles.title: Google just fired a warning shot in the AI subscription price wars
articles.description: Google just made it significantly cheaper to enjoy its budget AI subscription tier.
articles.author: Lucas Ropek, Connie Loizos
